text: Storyboard upgrade — 5 modern TikTok hook archetypes, action-verb scene descriptions, contrast/tension beats
Pipeline timing logs — Director/Storyboard/Critic/Compiler each log LLM call duration for analysis
Wait time hints — spinner shows 'usually takes X minutes' for slow stages
User isolation — projects scoped by user, only owner can view or modify
Turso cloud SQLite — credits now persist across server restarts
Google OAuth — stateless HMAC state token, survives restarts
Outro product display fix — uploaded photo now always shown in last frame
Relevance re-render loop — low-score shots auto-retry with enhanced prompt
fal.ai 5-min timeout guard — no more infinite hangs
VLM quality gate — each shot scored against storyboard description
